title: Create new task from content of an update
excerpt:
Add an option to the Update menu to “create new task/item/subitem” from this update.

posts.author: ACro (Andrew Crowe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Add an option to the Update menu to “create new task/item/subitem” from this update.

Copy the content of the Update into the new task and insert a reference to the new task in the original update so that it is clear that the Update has spawned a new task.

posts.author: rickgainsmith (Rick Gainsmith)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! People type in an update like a chat room when these chats require linked tasks to actually get things done.
